scenarios.name: Transaction Layering
scenarios.description: Incoming funds were rapidly distributed to new beneficiaries.

scenarios.name: Legitimate Business Payment
scenarios.description: An export invoice may explain the incoming payment.

supporting_evidence: Five receiving beneficiaries are new to the customer.
contradicting_evidence: A matching export invoice is attached to the customer profile.
missing_evidence: The five supplier relationships have not been verified.

decision_critical_evidence.question: Are the five receiving accounts verified suppliers?
decision_critical_evidence.why_it_matters: Verified suppliers support the legitimate business scenario.
decision_critical_evidence.recommended_action: Request supplier invoices and relationship records.
